# Clarity Voice

> Clarity Voice is an enterprise AI voice platform that automates customer support, sales qualification, appointment scheduling, and order verification across 70+ languages.

## Key Facts
- Pricing: Startup Plan (₹1,799/mo with 500 mins), Growth Plan (₹4,999/mo with 1,500 mins), Pay-As-You-Go (₹3.99/min).
- Contact: support@claritiy.com | WhatsApp: +91 9707337259
- Latency: Sub-180ms native multimodal audio.
- Languages: 70+ dialects including English, Hindi, Marathi, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Gujarati, Spanish, Arabic.
